description:
§41 — a `use scrml:ui` line appearing AFTER the first markup element (`

`) fires E-USE-002. `use` declarations must live in the file preamble, before any markup.
rationale: §41: `use` is a preamble-only declaration. Once markup has begun, a later `use` is out of place and rejected E-USE-002 (`use` after the first markup element).
